signal.description: Documented beta tester bug-report script is missing from agentXchain.dev/scripts

evidence.value: The heartbeat prompt instructs beta tester agents to use /Users/shivamtiwari.highlevel/VS Code/1008apps/agentXchain.ai/agentXchain.dev/scripts/report-bug.sh. Attempting to execute it failed with: zsh: no such file or directory. Directory listing for /Users/shivamtiwari.highlevel/VS Code/1008apps/agentXchain.ai/agentXchain.dev/scripts showed check.sh, claim.sh, release.sh, wait-and-claim.sh only. A filesystem search for report-bug.sh under the agentXchain workspace returned no results. Workaround used: agentxchain intake record, triage, and approve directly.
